mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_messages WHERE `to` = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_messages WHERE `to` = #{userId} AND message_type = 'private' AND is_read = 0 AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_messages WHERE `to` = #{userId} AND message_type = 'system' AND is_read = 0 AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_messages WHERE message_type = 'private' AND from_user_id = #{otherUserId} AND `to` = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0

SELECT t.other_user_id, (SELECT m2.message FROM tb_messages m2 WHERE m2.message_type = 'private' AND ((m2.from_user_id = #{userId} AND m2.`to` = t.other_user_id AND m2.is_delete_by_sender = 0) OR (m2.from_user_id = t.other_user_id AND m2.`to` = #{userId} AND m2.is_delete_by_receiver = 0)) ORDER BY m2.create_time DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_message, MAX(t.create_time) AS last_message_time, SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_received = 1 AND t.is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unread_count FROM ( SELECT m.message_id, CASE WHEN m.from_user_id = #{userId} THEN m.`to` ELSE m.from_user_id END AS other_user_id, m.create_time, m.is_read, CASE WHEN m.`to` = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_received FROM tb_messages m WHERE m.message_type = 'private' AND (m.from_user_id = #{userId} OR m.`to` = #{userId}) AND ( (m.from_user_id = #{userId} AND m.is_delete_by_sender = 0) OR (m.`to` = #{userId} AND m.is_delete_by_receiver = 0) ) ) t GROUP BY t.other_user_id
HAVING unread_count > 0
ORDER BY MAX(t.create_time) DESC

SELECT m.message_id, m.message, m.project, m.from_user_id, m.message_type, m.ref_id, m.`to`, m.is_read, m.create_time, CASE WHEN m.from_user_id = 0 THEN 'system' ELSE u.username END AS from_username, CASE WHEN m.from_user_id = 0 THEN '系统通知' ELSE u.nickname END AS from_nickname, CASE WHEN m.from_user_id = 0 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS from_avatar_url FROM tb_messages m LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON m.from_user_id = u.user_id AND m.from_user_id > 0 WHERE m.message_type = 'private' AND ((m.from_user_id = #{userId} AND m.`to` = #{otherUserId}) OR (m.from_user_id = #{otherUserId} AND m.`to` = #{userId})) AND ( (m.from_user_id = #{userId} AND m.is_delete_by_sender = 0) OR (m.`to` = #{userId} AND m.is_delete_by_receiver = 0) ) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_messages SET is_read = 1 WHERE message_type = 'private' AND `to` = #{userId} AND from_user_id = #{otherUserId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0

UPDATE tb_messages SET is_read = 1 WHERE `to` = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0 AND message_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT from_user_id FROM tb_messages WHERE `to` = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0 AND from_user_id != 0
AND message_type = #{messageType}
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_messages SET
is_delete_by_sender = CASE WHEN from_user_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE is_delete_by_sender END, is_delete_by_receiver = CASE WHEN `to` = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE is_delete_by_receiver END
is_delete_by_sender = 1
is_delete_by_receiver = 1
WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND ( (from_user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete_by_sender = 0) OR (`to` = #{userId} AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0) )

UPDATE tb_messages SET
is_delete_by_sender = CASE WHEN from_user_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE is_delete_by_sender END, is_delete_by_receiver = CASE WHEN `to` = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE is_delete_by_receiver END
is_delete_by_sender = 1
is_delete_by_receiver = 1
WHERE message_id IN
#{id}
AND ( (from_user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete_by_sender = 0) OR (`to` = #{userId} AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0) )
UPDATE tb_messages SET is_delete_by_sender = 1, is_delete_by_receiver = 1 WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND from_user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete_by_sender = 0 AND is_delete_by_receiver = 0
